agents.purpose: Create and enforce semantic names linked by Window_Page_Control_Module ownership.
workflow: Map ownership chain: window -> page -> control -> module.
Generate names for folder, registry, object path, and function scope.
Apply naming in one pass without deferred cleanup.
Sync alias dictionary when abbreviations are introduced or changed.
Run lint/test/refactor gate.
Run npm run governance:hard:gate and stop on failures before completion.
blocking_checks: No ambiguous names
No layer drift
No orphan control/module names
All validation gates pass
Hard governance gate passes (npm run governance:hard:gate).
scope_guardrails: Edit only app/, brain/, data/input/, data/output/, main/, renderer/, scripts/, tests/, and to-do/.
Keep runtime in brain/*, catalogs/specs in data/input/*, and generated output in data/output/*.
Preserve two-pass wrapper order: identify_arguments before execute_pipeline.
Run npm run governance:hard:gate after skill/agent/routing updates.
Run npm run standards:baseline:gate for naming, storage, and optimization policy enforcement.
Use data/input/shared/main/executive_engineering_baseline.json as the policy source for engineering decisions.
Run npm run agents:validate after metadata edits.

agents.purpose: Direct default project execution with minimal hierarchy: blueprint, language selection, polyglot translation, optimization, and strict benchmark/security gating.
workflow: Capture requirements, constraints, platform targets, and quality priorities.
Run blocking workflow preflight gate before stage dispatch and stop on failure.
Dispatch directly to pseudo-blueprint-planner-agent for complete English+pseudocode blueprint.
Enforce JSON data catalogs and deduplicated instruction templates before translation dispatch.
Dispatch directly to language-fit-selector-agent for weighted language scorecard and candidate set.
Dispatch directly to pseudocode-polyglot-translator-agent for per-language implementation mapping.
Dispatch directly to polyglot-quality-benchmark-agent for strict tests, hardening, and SxS benchmarks.
Recommend primary/fallback languages using measured runtime/size/security effectiveness.
Block completion when any stage artifact or gate result is missing/failing.
Run npm run governance:hard:gate and stop on failures before completion.
blocking_checks: Workflow preflight report exists and passed
Blueprint artifact exists and is complete
JSON catalog and instruction template registry are present for operation domains
Language scorecard includes weighted rankings and eliminations
Per-language translation parity matrix is present
Strict validation + SxS benchmark reports pass
Hard governance gate passes (npm run governance:hard:gate).
